title: The Treacherous
tmdbOverview: The story of Joseon's tyrant king Yeonsan who exploits the populace for his own carnal pleasures, his seemingly loyal retainer who controls him and all court dealings, and a woman who seeks vengeance.
synopsis: The Treacherous (2015) is a drama, history and crime film from South Korea. It carries a 6.1 rating on IMDb. It's one of the titles we feature across our 2010s and genre rankings. It carries a 18 certification (DE rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
